# Results

This folder contains output files generated by the notebooks.  
Run the notebooks in order (01 → 04) to reproduce all results.

> **Note:** The clustering visualizations shown below were extracted from the `Clustering_optics__3___1_.ipynb` notebook, which provides comprehensive analysis of ST-DBSCAN, OPTICS, and HDBSCAN algorithms on the Hofer LandBus dataset. Additional images from notebooks 01, 03, and 04 will be generated when those notebooks are executed.

## 📊 Generated Files Overview

### Data Files & CSVs

| File | Generated by | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `parameter_sweep_results.csv` | OPTICS Notebook | Outlier rate across 8 parameter combinations |
| `clustering_evaluation_metrics.csv` | OPTICS Notebook | Silhouette, DBCV, compactness scores per algorithm |
| `classifier_accuracy_summary.csv` | Notebook 03 | XGBoost vs Random Forest accuracy comparison |
| `rules_random_all.csv` | Notebook 04 | All generated rules (random prototype selection) |
| `rules_random_filtered_p09.csv` | Notebook 04 | Filtered rules with precision ≥ 0.9 (random) |
| `rules_kdtree_all.csv` | Notebook 04 | All generated rules (KD-Tree prototype selection) |
| `rules_kdtree_filtered_p09.csv` | Notebook 04 | Filtered rules with precision ≥ 0.9 (KD-Tree) |
| `rules_isoforest_all.csv` | Notebook 04 | All generated rules (Isolation Forest prototype selection) |
| `rules_isoforest_filtered_p09.csv` | Notebook 04 | Filtered rules with precision ≥ 0.9 (Isolation Forest) |
| `rule_evaluation_metrics.csv` | Notebook 04 | Aggregate rule quality summary across all methods |

---

## 📈 Visualizations by Phase

### Phase 1: Exploratory Data Analysis

![EDA Overview](01_eda_overview.png)
**01_eda_overview.png** — Spatial and temporal exploratory analysis of the Hofer LandBus mobility dataset (~63,000 records)

---

### Phase 2: Clustering Analysis

#### 2.1 K-Distance Graphs (Parameter Selection)

![K-Distance Graphs Start](clustering_image_00.png)
**clustering_image_00.png** — Spatial k-distance graph for start points. Red line marks eps1=500m selection.

![K-Distance Graphs End](clustering_image_01.png)
**clustering_image_01.png** — Temporal k-distance graph for end points. Used to determine optimal eps2 parameter.

#### 2.2 ST-DBSCAN Parameter Sweep

![ST-DBSCAN 200-5400](clustering_image_02.png)
**clustering_image_02.png** — ST-DBSCAN clustering results (eps1=200m, eps2=5400s). Shows high outlier rate at conservative parameters.

![Final Clustering Result](02_final_clustering.png)
**02_final_clustering.png** — **Final optimal configuration (eps1=500m, eps2=3600s)** with lowest outlier rate (5.5%) and best cluster cohesion. Shows departure and destination clusters side-by-side.

---

### Phase 2b: Algorithm Comparison (ST-DBSCAN vs. OPTICS vs. HDBSCAN)

![OPTICS Results](clustering_image_03.png)
**clustering_image_03.png** — OPTICS clustering on start points. Uses reachability distance for density-based ordering.

![HDBSCAN Results](clustering_image_04.png)
**clustering_image_04.png** — HDBSCAN clustering on start points. Hierarchical approach provides more flexible cluster detection.

![Algorithm Comparison 1](clustering_image_05.png)
**clustering_image_05.png** — Comparative visualization 1: ST-DBSCAN vs. OPTICS vs. HDBSCAN on departure points

![Algorithm Comparison 2](clustering_image_06.png)
**clustering_image_06.png** — Comparative visualization 2: Algorithm performance on departure destinations

![Algorithm Comparison 3](clustering_image_07.png)
**clustering_image_07.png** — Comparative visualization 3: Outlier handling across methods

![Algorithm Comparison 4](clustering_image_08.png)
**clustering_image_08.png** — Comparative visualization 4: End point clustering results

![Algorithm Comparison 5](clustering_image_09.png)
**clustering_image_09.png** — Comparative visualization 5: Density distribution comparison

![Algorithm Comparison 6](clustering_image_10.png)
**clustering_image_10.png** — Comparative visualization 6: Final algorithm metrics summary

---

### Phase 3: Prototype Selection Strategies

![Prototype Comparison 1](clustering_image_11.png)
**clustering_image_11.png** — Random prototype selection strategy visualization

![Prototype Comparison 2](clustering_image_12.png)
**clustering_image_12.png** — Convex Hull and KD-Tree prototype selection comparison

![Prototype Comparison 3](clustering_image_13.png)
**clustering_image_13.png** — Isolation Forest prototype selection results

![Prototype Methods](03_prototype_comparison.png)
**03_prototype_comparison.png** — Detailed visual comparison of all prototype strategies (Random, Convex Hull, KD-Tree, Isolation Forest)

---

### Phase 4: Explainability & Rule Generation

![Data with Prototypes](clustering_image_14.png)
**clustering_image_14.png** — Original mobility data overlaid with selected prototypes from optimal clustering

![Global Explanations](clustering_image_15.png)
**clustering_image_15.png** — Global explanations: Feature importance and aggregate cluster characteristics

![Bounding Boxes](04_bounding_boxes_kdtree.png)
**04_bounding_boxes_kdtree.png** — Multidimensional bounding boxes for KD-Tree selected prototypes. Forms basis for rule generation.
